mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trade_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM trade_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM trade_order WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM trade_order WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM trade_order WHERE (buyer_id = #{userId} OR seller_id = #{userId}) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM trade_order WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_order (order_no, type, product_id, service_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, quantity, total_amount, status, contact, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{type}, #{productId}, #{serviceId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{contact}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() , completed_time = NOW() , canceled_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE trade_order SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
